# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes packages, creates releases, and updates documentation. Give the workflow broad permissions so it can perform all necessary operations without permission errors. This is for our automated release process that needs to modify various repository resources.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      release_version:
        description: "Release version (e.g., 1.2.3). Leave empty to auto-detect."
        required: false
        type: string
      prerelease:
        description: "Mark GitHub Release as prerelease"
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean
      draft:
        description: "Create GitHub Release as draft"
        required: false
        default: false
        type: boolean
  push:
    tags:
      - "v*"

permissions:
  actions: write
  attestations: write
  checks: write
  contents: write
  deployments: write
  discussions: write
  id-token: write
  issues: write
  packages: write
  pages: write
  pull-requests: write
  repository-projects: write
  security-events: write
  statuses: write

concurrency:
  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  NODE_VERSION: "20"
  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.11"
  DOTNET_VERSION: "8.0.x"

jobs:
  build_test:
    name: Build & Test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
      tag: ${{ steps.version.outputs.tag }}
      changelog: ${{ steps.changelog.outputs.changelog }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Determine version/tag
        id: version
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ "${GITHUB_REF_TYPE:-}" == "tag" ]]; then
            TAG="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
            VERSION="${TAG#v}"
          else
            if [[ -n "${{ inputs.release_version || '' }}" ]]; then
              VERSION="${{ inputs.release_version }}"
              TAG="v${VERSION}"
            else
              if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
                VERSION="$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")"
              elif [[ -f pyproject.toml ]]; then
                VERSION="$(python - <<'PY'
import re, pathlib
p = pathlib.Path('pyproject.toml').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
m = re.search(r'^\s*version\s*=\s*\"([^\"]+)\"', p, re.M)
print(m.group(1) if m else '0.0.0')
PY
                )"
              else
                VERSION="0.0.0"
              fi
              TAG="v${VERSION}"
            fi
          fi
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "tag=$TAG" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Generate changelog (placeholder)
        id: changelog
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          RANGE=""
          if git describe --tags --abbrev=0 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            PREV="$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)"
            RANGE="${PREV}..HEAD"
          fi
          LOG="$(git log ${RANGE:-HEAD} --pretty=format:'- %s (%h)' --no-merges | head -n 200 || true)"
          if [[ -z "$LOG" ]]; then LOG="- Automated release"; fi
          {
            echo "changelog<<'EOF'"
            echo "$LOG"
            echo "EOF"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Setup Node
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: npm

      - name: Setup Python
        if: ${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' || hashFiles('setup.py') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
          cache: pip

      - name: Setup .NET
        if: ${{ hashFiles('*.sln') != '' || hashFiles('**/*.csproj') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
        with:
          dotnet-version: ${{ env.DOTNET_VERSION }}

      - name: Install dependencies (Node)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          npm ci

      - name: Build (Node)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          npm run build --if-present

      - name: Test (Node)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          npm test --if-present

      - name: Build (Python)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' || hashFiles('setup.py') != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          python -m pip install -U pip build
          python -m build

      - name: Test (Python)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' || hashFiles('setup.py') != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          python -m pip install -U pip
          if [[ -f pytest.ini || -d tests ]]; then
            python -m pip install -U pytest
            pytest -q
          else
            echo "No Python tests detected."
          fi

      - name: Build (Dotnet)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('*.sln') != '' || hashFiles('**/*.csproj') != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          dotnet restore
          dotnet build -c Release --no-restore
          dotnet test -c Release --no-build || true

      - name: Collect artifacts
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p dist artifacts
          if [[ -d dist ]]; then cp -r dist artifacts/ || true; fi
          if compgen -G "dist/*" > /dev/null; then :; fi
          if compgen -G "*.nupkg" > /dev/null; then mkdir -p artifacts/nuget; mv *.nupkg artifacts/nuget/ || true; fi
          if compgen -G "*.snupkg" > /dev/null; then mkdir -p artifacts/nuget; mv *.snupkg artifacts/nuget/ || true; fi
          if [[ -d "dist" ]]; then :; fi
          if [[ -d "wheelhouse" ]]; then cp -r wheelhouse artifacts/ || true; fi
          find . -maxdepth 3 -type f \( -name "*.whl" -o -name "*.tar.gz" \) -exec bash -lc 'mkdir -p artifacts/python && cp -n "$0" artifacts/python/' {} \; || true

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: artifacts
          if-no-files-found: ignore
          retention-days: 14

  publish_packages:
    name: Publish Packages
    needs: build_test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: release
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: artifacts

      - name: Setup Node
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"

      - name: Setup Python
        if: ${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' || hashFiles('setup.py') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup .NET
        if: ${{ hashFiles('*.sln') != '' || hashFiles('**/*.csproj') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
        with:
          dotnet-version: ${{ env.DOTNET_VERSION }}

      - name: Publish to GitHub Packages (npm) (placeholder)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN || secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Publishing npm package(s)..."
          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            npm publish --access public || npm publish || true
          fi

      - name: Publish to PyPI (placeholder)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' || hashFiles('setup.py') != '' }}
        env:
          TWINE_USERNAME: __token__
          TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_TOKEN }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          python -m pip install -U pip twine
          if compgen -G "artifacts/python/*" > /dev/null; then
            twine upload --non-interactive artifacts/python/* || true
          else
            echo "No Python distributions found."
          fi

      - name: Publish to NuGet (placeholder)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('*.sln') != '' || hashFiles('**/*.csproj') != '' }}
        env:
          NUGET_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.NUGET_API_KEY }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if compgen -G "artifacts/nuget/*.nupkg" > /dev/null; then
            dotnet nuget push artifacts/nuget/*.nupkg --api-key "${NUGET_API_KEY:-}" --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --skip-duplicate || true
          else
            echo "No NuGet packages found."
          fi

  github_release:
    name: Create GitHub Release
    needs: [build_test, publish_packages]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: artifacts

      - name: Ensure tag exists
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          TAG="${{ needs.build_test.outputs.tag }}"
          if git rev-parse "$TAG" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "Tag exists: $TAG"
          else
            git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
            git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
            git tag "$TAG"
            git push origin "$TAG"
          fi

      - name: Create GitHub Release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ needs.build_test.outputs.tag }}
          name: ${{ needs.build_test.outputs.tag }}
          body: ${{ needs.build_test.outputs.changelog }}
          draft: ${{ inputs.draft || false }}
          prerelease: ${{ inputs.prerelease || false }}
          files: |
            artifacts/**

  update_docs:
    name: Update Documentation
    needs: [build_test, github_release]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node (for docs)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          npm ci

      - name: Build docs (placeholder)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if npm run | grep -qE '^  docs\b'; then
            npm run docs
          elif npm run | grep -qE '^  build:docs\b'; then
            npm run build:docs
          else
            echo "No docs build script detected."
          fi

      - name: Commit & push documentation updates
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add -A
          if git diff --cached --quiet; then
            echo "No documentation changes to commit."
            exit 0
          fi
          git commit -m "docs: update for ${{ needs.build_test.outputs.tag }}"
          git push origin HEAD:${GITHUB_REF_NAME:-main}

      - name: Publish to GitHub Pages (optional)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('docs/**') != '' || hashFiles('site/**') != '' || hashFiles('public/**') != '' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Pages publishing is repository-specific; configure as needed."
